message:
fix(output): Fix rich_rust API compatibility issues

- Add explicit import for Renderable trait (not in prelude)
- Fix print_renderable fallback to use Console::new() instead of
  deprecated render() method
- Simplify eprint() since rich_rust Console doesn't support stderr -
  always strip markup for stderr output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
